examples: It pushed me forward again and up, out of the snowpack.
Their big feet might be hurting the largest member of the weasel family as snowpack declines across much of North America.
Fortunately, most of our water supply is renewed annually as snowpack in the Rockies.
In normal years, snowpack levels are lower and there is spare capacity on transmission lines.
Next year, if snowpack returns to normal levels, there will be plenty of spare transmission capacity.
